news.headline: Delhi schools sound alarm – and water bell – as India sizzles in brutal heatwave
news.summary:
Schools in India’s capital must ring regular bells to remind schoolchildren to drink water as the megacity gears up to face heatwave conditions, a new city order has said.

news.headline: Bringing babies into the world in Lebanon’s crammed shelters

news.headline: World Cup co-host Mexico ramps up security at tourist sites after shooting
news.summary:
Mexico’s government said it was bolstering security at tourist sites after a man opened fire on tourists at pyramids outside Mexico City less than two months before the Fifa World Cup.
The Monday shooting, carried out by a lone gunman on top of one of the Teotihuacan pyramids – a Unesco World Herita

news.headline: Climbing lamp posts cross-legged challenge goes viral in China with players often needing rescue
news.summary:
A Chinese woman who tried to copy a recently viral lamp post climbing challenge got herself stuck and had to call the police to rescue her.
The woman, surnamed Song, from eastern China’s Jiangsu province, was out for an after-dinner walk when she decided to take on the challenge.
